stemHtml: A pilot is flying an NDB holding pattern. They should continuously monitor the…

options.a: ADF needle as a means to identify a potential failure of the NDB.
options.b: Morse code as a means to identify a potential failure of the NDB.
options.c: ADF warning flag(s) as a means to identify a potential failure of the NDB.
options.d: ATC frequency as a means to receive information about a potential failure of the NDB.
